'''Irenez''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] who served second-in-command of [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]]' [[Garm Bel Iblis's movement|movement]]. A former [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], Irenez had heeded Bel Iblis's quiet call for soldiers after his split from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Alongside her counterpart [[Sena Leikvold Midanyl|Sena]] she served as Bel Iblis' chief advisor. She was middle aged by the time that [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] met her at ''[[Peregrine's Nest]]''.

==Biography==
Irenez's association with [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Bel Iblis]] began when he sponsored her admission to the [[Republic Military Academy]] on Corellia. Rather than joining the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]], Irenez put her military training to use as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]], forming a platoon that provided protection-for-hire against [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and crime lords to merchants along the edge of [[Core Worlds/Legends|the Core]].<ref name="TTTSB">''[[The Thrawn Trilogy Sourcebook]]''</ref> Her group remained uninvolved in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], until being approached by Garm Bel Iblis to join his [[Garm Bel Iblis's movement|newly formed resistance movement]] after his split from the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].<ref name="TEStC">''[[The Essential Guide to Characters]]''</ref>

Quickly rising the ranks, Irenez proved herself to be a capable commander during raids on [[Raid on Tangrene|Tangrene]] and [[Raid on Gestron|Gestron]], using her [[Commando/Legends|commando]] skills for one and her piloting skills for the other.<ref name="DFRSB">''[[Dark Force Rising Sourcebook]]''</ref> Eventually she became Bel Iblis's chief of security and intelligence coordinator.

In [[9 ABY/Legends|9 ABY]] she was responsible for securing the secret meetings of [[Tav Breil'lya]] and Garm Bel Iblis on [[New Cov/Legends|New Cov]]. Due to her picket lines Han Solo was intercepted when he tried to tail Breil'lya, as did [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] when he arrived on New Cov to meet Solo. When Imperial forces [[Raid on New Cov|raided]] Ilic to obtain drugs and medicines—a cover for the city's clandestine payments to the Empire—Irenez was ordered to help them return to their ships.

When Solo and Calrissian came to ''Peregrine's Nest'', Irenez asked them to try to engineer a request from [[Mon Mothma/Legends|Mon Mothma]] for a formal invitation to join the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], as she knew that Mothma was not seeking power for herself, and that Bel Iblis was too proud to go asking for an invitation. Irenez joined the New Republic with the rest of Bel Iblis' former forces.

==Personality and traits==
Irenez was a middle-aged [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] with short [[Color/Legends|gray]] hair.<ref name="DFRSB" />
